creator: thompsa@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,


The -n flag was added to dhclient-script on rev 1.17 but has not been
committed to the 6.x branch at all. You can check which version of the
sources you have with the command 'ident /sbin/dhclient-script', I would
expect it to say '$FreeBSD: src/sbin/dhclient/dhclient-script,v 1.4.2.4'


Andrew
